SEAF Artillery

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search
Mechanics
Missions
Objectives
SEAF Artillery
SEAF Artillery
Optional
Optional Objective Info
Minimum Difficulty
Easy
Maximum Difficulty
Super Helldive
Faction
 Super Earth Federation


Stratagems
Objective
SEAF Artillery
SEAF Artillery
Stratagem Details
Stratagem Code
Base Cooldown
0s

SEAF Artillery is a generic Optional Objective consisting of a large, stationary artillery platform. To complete the objective, Helldivers must activate the artillery, load five shells into it and then connect it to their Super Destroyer. Upon completion, all Helldivers in the mission gain access to five uses of the SEAF Artillery stratagem.

Contents

  • 1 Objective Steps
  • 2 Shell Types
  • 3 Stratagem Statistics
  • 4 Detailed Stats
  • 5 Tactical Information
  • 6 Gallery
  • 7 Trivia
  • 8 Change History

Objective Steps

  • Activate Artillery Terminal
  • Find artillery shells and load them into artillery gun
    • Up to seven shells will be scattered around the objective. Five of them must be loaded by hand.
    • Shells are two-handed objects, so Helldivers cannot sprint or hold a weapon while carrying them.
    • Each shell has a different effect when the SEAF Artillery stratagem is used.
  • Use terminal to establish communication with Super Destroyer
    • Directional inputs must be used to raise the signal strength to 100%.
  • Wait for the artillery system to initiate
    • This step will complete on its own, so any Helldivers present are free to leave.
  • Rewards: 200 Requisition Slips, 50 Experience, SEAF Artillery stratagem
    • Using the stratagem will prompt the artillery platform to fire a shell at the beacon.

Shell Types

Image Name Effect
Explosive Small explosion, identical to the Orbital Precision Strike.
High-Yield Explosive Large explosion, similar to the Eagle 500kg Bomb with a slightly smaller radius.
Mini-Nuke Massive explosion, identical to the NUX-223 Hellbomb.
Smoke Smokescreen that blocks line of sight.
Static Field Lingering, stunning EMS field.
Napalm Incendiary explosion with lingering fire.

Stratagem Statistics

General
Call-in Time Unknown seconds
Uses 5
Cooldown Standard 0 seconds
With Morale Augmentation 0 seconds

Status Fire

Status Strength 50
Demolition Force 30
Stagger Force 50
Push Force 40

Tactical Information

  • During mission planning, the SEAF Artillery stratagem is listed as standard issue if an artillery site is present on the map.
  • The shells will be fired in the order of when they were loaded each time the stratagem is used.
    • Communicating the order of the shells to other teammates by voice/text chat is recommended.
  • Unlike orbital strikes, the angle at which the shell will impact is independent of the Super Destroyer's position, being perfectly vertical instead.
  • All artillery shells have a minimum Demolition of 50, allowing them to destroy most structures.
    • Smoke, Static Field and Napalm shells will require direct hits.
    • Mini-Nuke shells can destroy objectives that usually mandate a Hellbomb, such as the Gunship Facility and Automaton Orbital Cannon.
  • The SEAF Artillery cannot be disabled by a Stratagem Jammer or Ion Storms, and remains available when mission time runs out.
    • Combined with the shells' demolition force, an active jammer can be neutralized safely instead of having to assault it directly.
  • SEAF Artillery shells can be thrown great distances by utilizing a special technique:
    • First, standing in front of a shell in the direction you want the shell to be thrown.
    • Then, interact with the shell to pick it up and open the map before it reaches your hands.
    • Finally, sprint to close the map to grab the thrown shell.
  • Contrary to some belief, activating the artillery terminal will not alert nearby enemies, it is simply coincidence due to patrol routes.

Gallery

  • SEAF artillery site on the minimap, house variation.
  • SEAF artillery site, with storage rink.
  • SEAF artillery site, with storage pit.
  • SEAF artillery site, inside a city.
  • Various loaded artillery shells. From left to right: Smoke, Static, Napalm, Explosive, Mini-Nuke.

Trivia

  • Before February 4th, 2025 (version patch 01.002.101), Helldivers were able treat the Artillery Shells like basketballs by repeatedly dropping and picking them up again to increase transportation speed thanks to small burst of sprinting between each drop-lifting.
    • There was also an even faster method where Helldivers "threw" the shells: This is done by dropping it while walking slightly forward of the shell picking it up again - but before the shell reached their hands they swapped to primary weapon. The shell couldn't stop at the hands because they were no longer free, so the shell did continue its trajectory.
      • Lore-wise the change from sluggish back-injury-inducing "kangaroo / deadlift"-carry-style and "heave"-push to now jog-enabling "wife-carry" and "log"-toss was explained in the patch-notes:

        The Ministry of Humanity has added a clause to its Principles of Correct Posture for Safe Lifting, now allowing Helldivers to jog while carrying two-handed items such as barrels and SEAF Artillery Rounds

Change History

Patch
Description

1.006.300
2026-06-16

Changes

  • Projectile damage increased
    • Projectile standard damage increased from 3,500 to 4,000
    • Projectile durable damage increased from 3,500 to 4,000
  • Explosive; explosion damage increased from 1,000 to 1,500

1.006.202
2026-04-28

Fix

  • SEAF Artillery will no longer let you insert a shell and then immediately remove it, thus softlocking the gun

1.003.000
2025-05-13

Undocumented Change

  • Burn damage increased from 50 to 100

1.001.201
2024-10-29

Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where switching to holding a grenade and picking up an artillery shell at the same time caused the artillery shell to become stuck in the Helldivers hands.

1.001.104
2024-10-15

Undocumented Changes

  • Projectile damage increased.
    • Projectile standard damage increased from 450 to 3,500
    • Projectile durable damage increased from 450 to 3,500
  • High-Yield Explosive; explosion damage increased from 1,200 to 1,500

1.000.400
2024-06-13

Changes

  • No longer blocked by Stratagem Jammers or Ion Storms.
  • Now available after the mission timer ends.

1.000.200
2024-04-02

Changes

  • SEAF Napalm: Fire damage per tick increased by 50% (from all sources).
  • Undocumented: Shell tips standardized.
  • Undocumented: All shell colors changed.
